---
title: "About"
---

## About EUR_DATA

EUR_DATA (*Integrating EU studies and Data Analytics using a Project-based
Learning Approach*) is an **Erasmus+ Jean Monnet Module** based at University
College Dublin and maintained by the
[Connected Politics Lab](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab). It is
coordinated by [James Cross](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8042-1099).

The module integrates the study of European Union politics with hands-on data
analytics. Students work with real institutional data to build practical
quantitative skills, and the structured datasets they help produce are released
here as open research resources.

This website hosts three kinds of output:

- **[Data](data.qmd)** — open, analysis-ready datasets on European political
  institutions, each with a codebook, reproducible pipeline code, and tests.
- **[Teaching](oer.qmd)** — open educational resources, including module syllabi,
  slides, and assessment materials.
- **Code** — the full pipelines that build each dataset, on
  [GitHub](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA).

## Licensing and citation

Data and educational resources are released under
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/); code under the
[Apache License 2.0](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/LICENSE).
Please cite EUR_DATA if you use it; see the
[CITATION file](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/CITATION.cff).

## Contact

For questions, corrections, or feature requests, please open an issue on the
[GitHub repository](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/issues).

## Acknowledgement

Co-funded by the European Union under the Erasmus+ Programme, Jean Monnet
Actions (grant 101127178). Views and opinions expressed are those of the
author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the
European Education and Culture Executive Agency (EACEA). Neither the European
Union nor EACEA can be held responsible for them.
